sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63748" key="logoqe/sios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">λογο-θέσιος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n63748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accountant</tr_>, Palchosin <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.94.26</biblScope> </bibl>: -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θέσια, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">account-books</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.95.17</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
